productDisplayName: Puma Kids Singlet Quarter White Socks
description: These soft socks will keep your toddlers' little feet comfortable inside their shoes. puma ensures that all their products are designed to offer the best performance and these socks are no exception.Pack of one pair of ankle length socks in whiteMade of 70% cotton, 29% nylon and 1% elastaneRib at opening to grip above ankleThree dimensional shaped heel and toe for best FitSock careMachine wash in warm waterDo not iron, bleach, tumble dry or dry clean
